description: §18.8.2 — a `match` over an ENUM-typed subject (`match r` where `r: Role`) SHALL NOT fire E-TYPE-025: an enum is a well-typed matchable subject. Acceptance sibling of e-type-025-asis-subject-pos: proves the non-matchable-subject rejection is scoped to opaque `asIs`, not narrowed enum types.
rationale: §18.8.2: an enum-typed subject is matchable, so the `asIs`/non-matchable-subject check is correctly silent.
